channel.title: METR Time Horizons Page Monitor
channel.description: Daily change-detection feed for the METR Task-Completion Time Horizons page.

item.title: UNCHANGED — https://metr.org/time-horizons/
item.description: No changes detected. 'Last Updated' date is still: March 3, 2026.

item.title: UNCHANGED — https://metr.org/time-horizons/
item.description: No changes detected. 'Last Updated' date is still: March 3, 2026.

item.title: UNCHANGED — https://metr.org/time-horizons/
item.description: No changes detected. 'Last Updated' date is still: March 3, 2026.

item.title: INITIAL — Monitoring started
item.description: Started monitoring https://metr.org/time-horizons/. Current 'Last Updated' date: March 3, 2026.
